name: Xi Jinping
role: General Secretary, CCP; Chairman, Central Military Commission; President, PRC
quote: The historical task of the complete reunification of the motherland must be fulfilled, and will definitely be fulfilled.

name: Lai Ching-te
role: President of Taiwan (ROC), 8th President — inaugurated May 20, 2024
quote: Taiwan is not part of the People's Republic of China. Taiwan's sovereignty and Taiwan's democracy cannot be infringed upon.

name: Donald Trump
role: US President (January 20, 2025 – present)
quote: They did take about 100% of our chip business. I think Taiwan should pay for its defense. I never comment on whether we'd defend Taiwan — I don't want to ever put myself in that position.

name: Joe Biden
role: US President (January 2021 – January 20, 2025)
quote: Yes. If in fact there was an unprecedented attack. Yes, we would get involved militarily to defend Taiwan.

name: Wang Yi
role: Director, CCP Central Foreign Affairs Commission; PRC Foreign Minister
quote: Taiwan is China's Taiwan. Any attempt to split China is doomed to fail, and will be crushed by the wheels of history.

name: Tsai Ing-wen
role: President of Taiwan (ROC), 2016–May 2024; First female Taiwan president
quote: Taiwan is already an independent country. We don't need to declare independence — we are the Republic of China. We are sovereign.

name: Nancy Pelosi
role: US House Speaker (visit Aug 2, 2022); retired 2023; triggered Fourth Taiwan Strait Crisis
quote: America's solidarity with the 23 million people of Taiwan is more important today than ever, as the world faces a choice between autocracy and democracy.

name: Kevin McCarthy
role: US House Speaker (Jan 2023–Oct 2023); met President Tsai at Reagan Library April 5, 2023
quote: America does not waver — we support Taiwan's democracy and will always stand with our friends.

name: Hsiao Bi-khim
role: Vice President of Taiwan; former de facto ambassador to US (TECRO); inaugurated May 2024
quote: Our relationship with the United States is based on shared values of democracy, freedom, and the rule of law — and it will endure.

name: Cho Jung-tai
role: Premier of Taiwan (Executive Yuan), May 2024–present; former DPP Chairman
quote: Taiwan's defense is not a burden — it is an investment in the values and way of life we cherish.

name: Fumio Kishida
role: Prime Minister of Japan (2021–2024); announced historic defense budget doubling
quote: A Taiwan contingency is a Japanese contingency. Japan must have the capability to counterattack enemy bases if attacked.

name: Wang Huning
role: Politburo Standing Committee; top CCP ideologue; heads Taiwan policy coordination
quote: National reunification is the shared aspiration of the Chinese people on both sides of the strait. It will be realized.

name: Adm. John Aquilino
role: Commander, US Indo-Pacific Command (INDOPACOM) 2021–2024
quote: The threat of a Chinese attack on Taiwan is much closer than most think — within this decade. We need to act urgently.

name: Lloyd Austin
role: US Secretary of Defense (2021–January 2025)
quote: The United States has an abiding interest in peace and stability across the Taiwan Strait. We will maintain the ability to resist any resort to force or coercion.

name: Wellington Koo
role: Taiwan Minister of National Defense (2024–present)
quote: We are accelerating asymmetric capabilities acquisition. Taiwan will make any attack cost-prohibitive for the PLA.

name: Hou Yu-ih
role: KMT presidential candidate 2024; New Taipei Mayor; cross-strait dialogue advocate
quote: Only through stable cross-strait relations can Taiwan achieve security and prosperity. Military confrontation benefits no one.

name: Ko Wen-je
role: Taiwan People's Party (TPP) leader; presidential candidate 2024; pragmatic cross-strait position
quote: Taiwan needs to be strong enough that attack is not worth the price — but also wise enough to maintain dialogue channels.

name: Ferdinand Marcos Jr.
role: President of the Philippines; expanded US basing access (EDCA); South China Sea tensions
quote: The Philippines will defend its sovereign rights in the West Philippine Sea. We will not yield a single square inch of our territory.

name: António Guterres
role: UN Secretary-General; calls for diplomatic resolution of Taiwan Strait tensions
quote: The Taiwan Strait is a flashpoint for global stability. The world cannot afford a military confrontation in East Asia.

name: Shigeru Ishiba
role: Prime Minister of Japan (September 2024–present); defense hawk; supports Taiwan Strait security
quote: Japan must work with the United States and like-minded partners to maintain peace across the Taiwan Strait. We have a direct stake in this outcome.
